frontends.name: users-frontend
frontends.description: Microfrontend — Users domain UI (profile, settings, authentication)

frontends.name: products-frontend
frontends.description: Microfrontend — Products domain UI (catalogue, detail, search)

frontends.name: host-frontend
frontends.description: Host React application — composes all microfrontends at runtime

backends.name: users-service
backends.description: REST API — Users domain (accounts, authentication, profile)

backends.name: products-service
backends.description: REST API — Products domain (catalogue, inventory, pricing)

libs.name: tw-common-frontend
libs.description: Shared React hooks, context providers, and UI primitives used across all microfrontends

libs.name: tw-api-client
libs.description: Typed HTTP client wrappers for all internal REST APIs, shared by frontends

libs.name: tw-common-backend
libs.description: Shared Express middleware, JWT utilities, and error-handling helpers used across all backend services

libs.name: tw-config
libs.description: Centralised environment variable loader and schema validation for all services
